issue.title: Bulk YOLO: enqueue selected issues into a serial /tiki:yolo cascade

phases.title: useBulkYoloStore: persisted queue state + actions (start, advance, pause, resume, abort)
verification: `bulkYoloStore.ts` exports `useBulkYoloStore` with `runByProject: Record<string, BulkYoloRun | null>` state and actions `startRun`, `advance`, `recordFailure`, `pause`, `resume`, `abort`, plus selectors `current`, `remaining`, `isActive`.
Types `BulkYoloStatus` ('idle' | 'running' | 'paused' | 'failed'), `BulkYoloFailure`, `BulkYoloRun` exported.
Store uses `persist` middleware with `name: 'tiki-bulk-yolo'`, `version: 1`, partializes `runByProject` (so resume across desktop restarts works).
`startRun` is no-op on empty queue; sets `terminalId`, status='running', and timestamps.

`advance` sets status='idle' when the queue is exhausted; `recordFailure` sets status='failed' and appends; `pause`/`resume` toggle status without losing position; `abort` clears the project's run to null.
`apps/desktop/src/stores/__tests__/bulkYoloStore.test.ts` adds 5 vitest cases (startRun, advance through to idle, recordFailure, pause/resume, abort).
`pnpm build` clean; `pnpm test` desktop count 114 → 119 (+5).
phases.summary: Created `apps/desktop/src/stores/bulkYoloStore.ts` with persisted per-project queue state (status, queue, currentIndex, completed, failures, terminalId) and full action surface (startRun/advance/recordFailure/pause/resume/abort + selectors). Re-exported from `stores/index.ts` and added 5 vitest cases mocking projectsStore — desktop test count 114 → 119, `pnpm build` clean.

phases.title: Bulk YOLO controller — auto-advance via tiki-state listener; dispatch /tiki:yolo via write_terminal
verification: App.tsx `tiki-file-changed` listener `stateChanged` branch detects bulk-yolo current-issue advance (issue moved from activeWork to history.recentIssues) and calls `useBulkYoloStore.getState().advance()` + `dispatchNextBulkYolo(projectId)`.
Same listener detects current-issue failure (activeWork[issue:N].status === 'failed') and calls `recordFailure(reason)` + surfaces an error toast.
`apps/desktop/src/utils/bulkYoloDispatch.ts` exports `async dispatchNextBulkYolo(projectId)` that invokes `write_terminal` with `/tiki:yolo {N}\r` on the run's terminal id.
Dispatch helper no-ops when run is null, status !== 'running', queue exhausted, or terminalId is null.
Dispatch failure (e.g. terminal closed) records a failure rather than throwing.
Cascade only triggers on the queue's current issue — manual /tiki:yolo runs on other issues don't accidentally advance.
`pnpm build` clean; test count unchanged from Phase 1 (119).
phases.summary: Created `apps/desktop/src/utils/bulkYoloDispatch.ts` exporting `dispatchNextBulkYolo(projectId)` that issues `/tiki:yolo {N}\r` via `invoke('write_terminal', ...)` with full no-op guards and recordFailure on invoke errors. Layered the bulk-yolo branch into App.tsx's `tiki-file-changed` listener after the existing `detectGithubRefreshTriggers` block — detects activeWork→history transition (advance + dispatch) and `failed` status (recordFailure + error toast), keyed to the run's current issue so manual /tiki:yolo runs don't false-trigger.

phases.title: BulkYoloDialog: progress UI + Run YOLO button in BulkActionToolbar + dispatch helper test
verification: `apps/desktop/src/components/BulkYoloDialog.tsx` exports `BulkYoloDialog`; auto-hides when no run for the active project; otherwise renders queue, current, failures, status, terminal target, action buttons.
Dialog uses `useBulkYoloStore` for state and `useIssuesStore` for issue titles; `useTerminalStore` to look up the run's terminal tab name.
Mounted at App.tsx root next to `<BulkActionToolbar />`.
Pause/Resume buttons toggle based on status; Abort button uses native `confirm()` before clearing.

BulkActionToolbar gains a 'Run YOLO' button (disabled while bulkActive); on click, captures the active terminal's id, calls `startRun(selected, terminalId)` + `dispatchNextBulkYolo(projectId)`, clears the selection.
If no terminal is active, surfaces an error toast and does not start the run.
`apps/desktop/src/utils/__tests__/bulkYoloDispatch.test.ts` adds 3 vitest cases (running dispatches with correct args, no-op on no-run, no-op on paused).
`pnpm build` clean; `pnpm test` desktop count 119 → 122 (+3).
phases.summary: Built `BulkYoloDialog.tsx` + CSS (floating bottom-right card, non-blocking) showing queue, status, current issue, completed list, failures, terminal target, and Pause/Resume/Abort. Mounted at App.tsx root next to `<BulkActionToolbar />`. Added 'Run YOLO' button to `BulkActionToolbar` using the **active-terminal-required** path (toast error if no active terminal — sidesteps the addTabInBackground PTY race). Used `tab.title` (not `tab.name`) since that's the actual TerminalTab field. 3 dispatch helper vitest cases — desktop count 119 → 122.
